utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hi ! Umm , I am Monica Geller , I am the chef at Alessandro .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I think the things that you said about me are really unfair , and I would like for you to give my bouillabaisse another chance .

utterances.speaker: The Food Critic
utterances.text: I do not see any reason why I would do that to myself again .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Either eat it , or be in it .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I do not see any reason why I would do that to myself again .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Spoon ? So , what do you think ?

utterances.speaker: The Food Critic
utterances.text: I am torn , between my integrity and my desire to avoid a beating . But I must be honest , your soap is abysmal .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Thata girl ! Huh ? We should get out of here ... there is a new class comin in .

utterances.speaker: The Cooking Teacher
utterances.text: Welcome to introduction to cooking . Now , before we start , can anyone tell me the difference between a hollandaise sauce and a bearnaise sauce ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well umm , they both have a egg yolk and butter base , but a bearnaise has shallots , shirvel , and most importantly tarragon .

utterances.speaker: The Cooking Teacher
utterances.text: That is very good , what your name ?

utterances.speaker: The Cooking Teacher
utterances.text: Monica , you go to the head of the class .

emotion_cause.span: 15_you go to the head of the class .
